args.code:
import json, re, pandas as pd
from pathlib import Path
# load clinical C50.*
path = var_call_SFSNl9u9OlpKVn8V5Z5JPTu6
recs = json.loads(Path(path).read_text())
df = pd.DataFrame(recs)
# alive filter by text in Patient_description
alive = df[df['Patient_description'].str.contains(r'vital status\s*[:=]\s*Alive\b', case=False, regex=True, na=False)].copy()
# extract barcode
alive['barcode'] = alive['Patient_description'].str.extract(r'barcode\s+(TCGA-[A-Z0-9]{2}-[A-Z0-9]{4})', flags=re.IGNORECASE)[0]
# some strings 'patient TCGA-..' not 'barcode'
alive.loc[alive['barcode'].isna(), 'barcode'] = alive.loc[alive['barcode'].isna(), 'Patient_description'].str.extract(r'patient\s+(TCGA-[A-Z0-9]{2}-[A-Z0-9]{4})', flags=re.IGNORECASE)[0]
# drop missing barcodes
alive = alive.dropna(subset=['barcode'])
# CDH1 mutated list
# load file from previous mutation query
mut_path = var_call_jnqKQ1UkWX9QOrlCGqKkocop
mut_recs = json.loads(Path(mut_path).read_text())
mut_set = set(r['ParticipantBarcode'] for r in mut_recs)
# compute per hist type
alive['is_cdh1_mut'] = alive['barcode'].isin(mut_set)
# group
grp = alive.groupby('histological_type').agg(n_alive=('barcode','nunique'), n_mut=('is_cdh1_mut','sum'))
grp['pct_mut'] = (grp['n_mut'] / grp['n_alive'] * 100).round(2)
# require at least 5 alive to avoid tiny denominators
res = grp[grp['n_alive']>=5].sort_values(['pct_mut','n_mut','n_alive'], ascending=False).head(3).reset_index()
result = res.to_dict(orient='records')
print('__RESULT__:')
print(json.dumps(result))

import json, re, pandas as pd
from pathlib import Path
# load clinical C50.*
path = var_call_SFSNl9u9OlpKVn8V5Z5JPTu6
recs = json.loads(Path(path).read_text())
df = pd.DataFrame(recs)
# alive filter by text in Patient_description
alive = df[df['Patient_description'].str.contains(r'vital status\s*[:=]\s*Alive\b', case=False, regex=True, na=False)].copy()
# extract barcode
alive['barcode'] = alive['Patient_description'].str.extract(r'barcode\s+(TCGA-[A-Z0-9]{2}-[A-Z0-9]{4})', flags=re.IGNORECASE)[0]
# some strings 'patient TCGA-..' not 'barcode'
alive.loc[alive['barcode'].isna(), 'barcode'] = alive.loc[alive['barcode'].isna(), 'Patient_description'].str.extract(r'patient\s+(TCGA-[A-Z0-9]{2}-[A-Z0-9]{4})', flags=re.IGNORECASE)[0]
# drop missing barcodes
alive = alive.dropna(subset=['barcode'])
# CDH1 mutated list
# load file from previous mutation query
mut_path = var_call_jnqKQ1UkWX9QOrlCGqKkocop
mut_recs = json.loads(Path(mut_path).read_text())
mut_set = set(r['ParticipantBarcode'] for r in mut_recs)
# compute per hist type
alive['is_cdh1_mut'] = alive['barcode'].isin(mut_set)
# group
grp = alive.groupby('histological_type').agg(n_alive=('barcode','nunique'), n_mut=('is_cdh1_mut','sum'))
grp['pct_mut'] = (grp['n_mut'] / grp['n_alive'] * 100).round(2)
# require at least 5 alive to avoid tiny denominators
res = grp[grp['n_alive']>=5].sort_values(['pct_mut','n_mut','n_alive'], ascending=False).head(3).reset_index()
result = res.to_dict(orient='records')
print('__RESULT__:')
print(json.dumps(result))

args.code:
import json, re, pandas as pd
from pathlib import Path
path = var_call_SFSNl9u9OlpKVn8V5Z5JPTu6
recs = json.loads(Path(path).read_text())
df = pd.DataFrame(recs)
# determine alive count parsed
alive_mask = df['Patient_description'].str.contains(r'vital status', case=False, na=False) & df['Patient_description'].str.contains(r'Alive', case=False, na=False)
alive = df[alive_mask].copy()
# extract barcode
def ext(s):
    m = re.search(r'(?:barcode|patient)\s+(TCGA-[A-Z0-9]{2}-[A-Z0-9]{4})', s, re.I)
    return m.group(1) if m else None
alive['barcode'] = alive['Patient_description'].apply(ext)
print('__RESULT__:')
print(json.dumps({'n_total':len(df),'n_alive':len(alive),'n_alive_with_barcode':alive['barcode'].notna().sum(),'hist_types':alive['histological_type'].value_counts().head(10).to_dict()}))

val_args.code:
import json, re, pandas as pd
from pathlib import Path
path = var_call_SFSNl9u9OlpKVn8V5Z5JPTu6
recs = json.loads(Path(path).read_text())
df = pd.DataFrame(recs)
# determine alive count parsed
alive_mask = df['Patient_description'].str.contains(r'vital status', case=False, na=False) & df['Patient_description'].str.contains(r'Alive', case=False, na=False)
alive = df[alive_mask].copy()
# extract barcode
def ext(s):
    m = re.search(r'(?:barcode|patient)\s+(TCGA-[A-Z0-9]{2}-[A-Z0-9]{4})', s, re.I)
    return m.group(1) if m else None
alive['barcode'] = alive['Patient_description'].apply(ext)
print('__RESULT__:')
print(json.dumps({'n_total':len(df),'n_alive':len(alive),'n_alive_with_barcode':alive['barcode'].notna().sum(),'hist_types':alive['histological_type'].value_counts().head(10).to_dict()}))

args.code:
import json, re, pandas as pd
from pathlib import Path
path = var_call_SFSNl9u9OlpKVn8V5Z5JPTu6
recs = json.loads(Path(path).read_text())
df = pd.DataFrame(recs)
alive_mask = df['Patient_description'].str.contains(r'vital status', case=False, na=False) & df['Patient_description'].str.contains(r'Alive', case=False, na=False)
alive = df[alive_mask].copy()

def ext(s):
    m = re.search(r'(?:barcode|patient)\s+(TCGA-[A-Z0-9]{2}-[A-Z0-9]{4})', s, re.I)
    return m.group(1) if m else None
alive['barcode'] = alive['Patient_description'].apply(ext)
vc = alive['histological_type'].value_counts().head(10)
hist_types = {k:int(v) for k,v in vc.items()}
print('__RESULT__:')
print(json.dumps({'n_total':int(len(df)),'n_alive':int(len(alive)),'n_alive_with_barcode':int(alive['barcode'].notna().sum()),'hist_types':hist_types}))

alive['barcode'] = alive['Patient_description'].apply(ext)

args.code:
import json, re, pandas as pd
from pathlib import Path
# load clinical
recs = json.loads(Path(var_call_SFSNl9u9OlpKVn8V5Z5JPTu6).read_text())
df = pd.DataFrame(recs)
alive = df[df['Patient_description'].str.contains(r'vital status', case=False, na=False) & df['Patient_description'].str.contains(r'Alive', case=False, na=False)].copy()
# extract barcode
alive['barcode'] = alive['Patient_description'].str.extract(r'(?:barcode|patient)\s+(TCGA-[A-Z0-9]{2}-[A-Z0-9]{4})', flags=re.IGNORECASE)[0]
# mutated set from mutation list
mut_recs = json.loads(Path(var_call_jnqKQ1UkWX9QOrlCGqKkocop).read_text())
mut_set = set(r['ParticipantBarcode'] for r in mut_recs)
# restrict to BRCA alive by checking barcode exists in alive df; now compute mutation status
alive['is_cdh1_mut'] = alive['barcode'].isin(mut_set)
# group
grp = alive.groupby('histological_type').agg(n_alive=('barcode','nunique'), n_mut=('is_cdh1_mut','sum'))
grp['pct_mut'] = (grp['n_mut']/grp['n_alive']*100)
res = grp.sort_values(['pct_mut','n_mut','n_alive'], ascending=False).head(3).reset_index()
# round pct
res['pct_mut'] = res['pct_mut'].round(2)
# cast ints
res['n_alive']=res['n_alive'].astype(int)
res['n_mut']=res['n_mut'].astype(int)
print('__RESULT__:')
print(res.to_json(orient='records'))

import json, re, pandas as pd
from pathlib import Path
# load clinical
recs = json.loads(Path(var_call_SFSNl9u9OlpKVn8V5Z5JPTu6).read_text())
df = pd.DataFrame(recs)
alive = df[df['Patient_description'].str.contains(r'vital status', case=False, na=False) & df['Patient_description'].str.contains(r'Alive', case=False, na=False)].copy()
# extract barcode
alive['barcode'] = alive['Patient_description'].str.extract(r'(?:barcode|patient)\s+(TCGA-[A-Z0-9]{2}-[A-Z0-9]{4})', flags=re.IGNORECASE)[0]
# mutated set from mutation list
mut_recs = json.loads(Path(var_call_jnqKQ1UkWX9QOrlCGqKkocop).read_text())
mut_set = set(r['ParticipantBarcode'] for r in mut_recs)
# restrict to BRCA alive by checking barcode exists in alive df; now compute mutation status
alive['is_cdh1_mut'] = alive['barcode'].isin(mut_set)
# group
grp = alive.groupby('histological_type').agg(n_alive=('barcode','nunique'), n_mut=('is_cdh1_mut','sum'))
grp['pct_mut'] = (grp['n_mut']/grp['n_alive']*100)
res = grp.sort_values(['pct_mut','n_mut','n_alive'], ascending=False).head(3).reset_index()
# round pct
res['pct_mut'] = res['pct_mut'].round(2)
# cast ints
res['n_alive']=res['n_alive'].astype(int)
res['n_mut']=res['n_mut'].astype(int)
print('__RESULT__:')
print(res.to_json(orient='records'))
